name: age-group
description: Age-bucket classifier for Athletes + Teams. Answers 'is this Athlete eligible for this Team's age category?'. Sport-agnostic at the base level — an AgeGroup like 'U12' means 'under 12 as of the cutoff date' regardless of sport. Sport-specific overrides exist: many federations use different cutoff dates per sport (football uses Jan 1 in Europe, Aug 1 in the US; swimming uses birthdate exact). Every tenant seeds a standard age-group catalog on TenantProvisioned covering U6..U18 + Adult + Senior + Masters; tenants may add custom groups per entitlement. Ships: AgeGroup model with (min_age_inclusive, max_age_inclusive) + cutoff_date_kind (calendar_year / academic_year / rolling_from_birthday / custom_date) + sport_key (optional — for sport-specific groups) + is_default + is_seeded (distinguishes platform-provisioned defaults from tenant customs); a default 10-entry catalog seeded at TenantProvisioned; membership resolver `AgeGroupResolver::resolveFor(athlete, sport_key?, on_date=today)` returns the AgeGroup an athlete falls into. Downstream: Team.age_group_id (Wave 2b nullable), AthleteEnrollment.age_group_snapshot_id (Wave 3+ — snapshotted at enrollment time so the enrollment survives athlete birthday drift). Small tier auto-seeded catalog only; Medium+ can customise; Enterprise can define sport-specific overrides.

tenant.description: Tenant-facing age-group CRUD + lifecycle (set-default / archive / restore) + a hypothetical-resolve endpoint that shows which age group a DOB + sport_key falls into. Read is open to every tenant member (age groups are UI reference data every enrollment + roster form needs); write is admin/owner-only.
